CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

description: '品質+安全審查 workflow（取代閉環 Phase 3）：parallel 多視角審查（correctness/security/repro lens）→ 對抗驗證 findings。異源 skeptic 打破同源自審天花板（#007）。',\\n  phases: [\\n    { title: 'Review' },\\n    { title: 'Verify' },\\n    { title: 'Synthesize' },\\n  ],\\n}\\n\\n// args: 審查目標（檔案清單 / 變更描述 / undefined=審查未 commit 變更）\\nconst TARGET = typeof args === 'string' && args.trim()\\n  ? args.trim()\\n  : (Array.isArray(args) ? args.join(' ') : '未 commit 變更（用 git diff / git status 找出範圍）')\\n\\nconst FINDING_SCHEMA = {\\n  type: 'object', additionalProperties: false,\\n  required: ['lens', 'findings'],\\n  properties: {\\n    lens: { type: 'string' },\\n    findings: {\\n      type: 'array',\\n      items: {\\n        type: 'object', additionalProperties: false,\\n        required: ['severity', 'where', 'problem', 'fix'],\\n        properties: {\\n          severity: { type: 'string', enum: ['high', 'medium', 'low'] },\\n          where: { type: 'string', description: '檔:行' },\\n          problem: { type: 'string' },\\n          fix: { type: 'string' },\\n        },\\n      },\\n    },\\n  },\\n}\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Review')\\n\\nconst lenses = [\\n  {\\n    key: 'correctness',\\n    prompt: `你是 correctness 審查者。審查目標：${TARGET}。\\n重點：邏輯錯誤 / 邊界條件 / 因果鏈漏接（改了 X 但連動的 Y 沒改——grep 呼叫者窮舉驗證）/ 設計-實作一致性。\\n對每個「改了某處」的判斷，用 grep 驗證呼叫者，呼叫者=0 的修改要警示。`,\\n  },\\n  {\\n    key: 'security',\\n    prompt: `你是 security 審查者。審查目標：${TARGET}。\\n5 面向：輸入驗證 / 注入（SQL/cmd/path）/ 認證授權 / 敏感資料暴露 / 依賴風險。給攻擊向量，不只列規則。\\n無安全面向（純算法/UI 無外部輸入）則回報「無安全相關 finding」。`,\\n  },\\n  {\\n    key: 'repro-quality',\\n    prompt: `你是可重現性+質量審查者。審查目標：${TARGET}。\\n重點：是否可被測試覆蓋（BC-x 有無對應測試）/ 過度設計（YAGNI 違反）/ 你的改動造成的 dead code（orphan imports/函式）/ 既有 dead code（提及不動）。`,\\n  },\\n]\\n\\nconst reviews = (await parallel(lenses.map(l => () =>\\n  agent(l.prompt, { label: `review:${l.key}`, phase: 'Review', schema: FINDING_SCHEMA })\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\n// 攤平所有 high/medium findings 去重後對抗驗證\\nconst allFindings = reviews.flatMap(r => (r.findings || []).map(f => ({ ...f, lens: r.lens })))\\nconst toVerify = allFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'high' || f.severity === 'medium')\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Verify')\\n\\nconst VERDICT_SCHEMA = {\\n  type: 'object', additionalProperties: false,\\n  required: ['isReal', 'confidence', 'reasoning'],\\n  properties: {\\n    isReal: { type: 'boolean', description: '這個 finding 是真問題還是誤報' },\\n    confidence: { type: 'number' },\\n    reasoning: { type: 'string' },\\n  },\\n}\\n\\n// 每個 high/medium finding 派獨立 skeptic 嘗試「反駁這是真問題」（異源驗證，打破同源天花板）\\nconst verified = (await parallel(toVerify.map((f, i) => () =>\\n  agent(\\n    `你是獨立驗證者（與發現此問題的 reviewer 不同 context）。盡力反駁以下 finding 是真問題——它可能是誤報。\\n若你能證明它不是問題（誤讀程式碼 / 已被別處處理 / 不在執行路徑），判 isReal=false。若反駁失敗，判 isReal=true。\\nFinding：${JSON.stringify(f)}\\n審查目標：${TARGET}\\n用 Read/Grep 實際查證程式碼，不要憑空判斷。`,\\n    { label: `verify:${f.lens}-${i}`, phase: 'Verify', schema: VERDICT_SCHEMA }\\n  ).then(v => ({ finding: f, verdict: v }))\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\nconst confirmed = verified.filter(v => v.verdict?.isReal)\\nconst dismissed = verified.filter(v => v.verdict && !v.verdict.isReal)\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Synthesize')\\n\\nconst report = await agent(\\n  `你是審查彙整者。產出審查報告（繁中）。\\n確認為真的 findings（已通過獨立 skeptic 驗證）：${JSON.stringify(confirmed)}\\n被駁回的誤報（記錄但不要求修）：${JSON.stringify(dismissed)}\\n低嚴重度 findings（未經對抗驗證，摘要即可）：${JSON.stringify(allFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'low'))}\\n\\n彙整：(1) high findings 清單（R-x 編號，severity high→必修）(2) medium（建議/用戶決策）(3) low 摘要 (4) 誤報記錄 (5) 整體 verdict（pass / fix-required / needs-attention）。\\n誠實，不放大也不縮小。寫入 .claude-loop/artifacts/P3-review.md 並回報摘要。`,\\n  { label: 'review-synthesis', phase: 'Synthesize' }\\n)\\n\\nreturn { report, confirmed: confirmed.length, dismissed: dismissed.length }\\n\",\"numLines\":111,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":111}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

content.thinking:
This is reading the dev-review.js workflow file. Let me analyze what this workflow does:

1. It's a quality + security review workflow that replaces "Phase 3" of some closed-loop process
2. It performs parallel multi-perspective reviews (correctness/security/repro lens)
3. It uses adversarial verification of findings with independent skeptics to break the "same-source self-review ceiling" (issue #007)
4. It has 3 phases: Review, Verify, Synthesize

Key technical details:
- Reviews uncommitted changes by default (git diff/git status)
- Three review lenses: correctness, security, repro-quality
- Parallel execution of reviews using agent calls
- High/medium findings are verified by independent skeptics (adversarial verification)
- Low severity findings skip verification
- Final synthesis produces a report in .claude-loop/artifacts/P3-review.md
- Uses structured schemas for findings and verdicts

This is a discovery of how the existing dev-review workflow is implemented. The user is learning about this workflow's architecture and capabilities.

```xml
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>dev-review workflow implements multi-agent adversarial code review</title>
  <subtitle>Three-phase workflow uses parallel review lenses and independent skeptic verification to break self-review limitations</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>dev-review.js workflow performs quality and security reviews with three phases: Review, Verify, Synthesize</fact>
    <fact>Review phase runs three parallel lenses: correctness (logic/boundary/caller verification), security (5 attack vectors), and repro-quality (testability/YAGNI/dead code)</fact>
    <fact>Verify phase uses independent skeptic agents to adversarially validate high/medium findings, attempting to disprove them as false positives</fact>
    <fact>Skeptic verification breaks same-source self-review ceiling by using different context to challenge findings (referenced as issue #007)</fact>
    <fact>Correctness lens uses grep to exhaustively verify callers for each modification, alerting when caller count is zero</fact>
    <fact>Security lens evaluates input validation, injection risks, auth/authz, sensitive data exposure, and dependency risks with attack vectors</fact>
    <fact>Final synthesis generates report in .claude-loop/artifacts/P3-review.md with confirmed findings, dismissed false positives, and overall verdict</fact>
    <fact>Workflow defaults to reviewing uncommitted changes via git diff/git status when no target specified</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Examined the dev-review.js workflow implementation, which replaces Phase 3 of a closed-loop process with an adversarial multi-agent review system. The workflow orchestrates three distinct review perspectives (correctness, security, repro-quality) executed in parallel, each analyzing code changes through different lenses. High and medium severity findings undergo adversarial verification where independent skeptic agents attempt to disprove them as false positives by reading actual code—this heterogeneous validation breaks the ceiling of same-context self-review. The correctness lens specifically uses grep to exhaustively verify all callers of modified code, flagging orphaned changes. The security lens requires concrete attack vectors rather than generic rule citations. Final synthesis produces structured reports with severity-based categorization (high=must-fix, medium=recommended, low=awareness) and overall verdicts (pass/fix-required/needs-attention).</narrative>
  <concepts>

    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
  </concepts>

</observation>

reviews = (await parallel(lenses.map(l => () =>\\n  agent(l.prompt, { label: `review:${l.key}`, phase: 'Review', schema: FINDING_SCHEMA })\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\n// 攤平所有 high/medium findings 去重後對抗驗證\\nconst allFindings = reviews.flatMap(r => (r.findings || []).map(f => ({ ...f, lens: r.lens })))\\nconst toVerify = allFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'high' || f.severity === 'medium')\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Verify')\\n\\nconst VERDICT_SCHEMA = {\\n  type: 'object', additionalProperties: false,\\n  required: ['isReal', 'confidence', 'reasoning'],\\n  properties: {\\n    isReal: { type: 'boolean', description: '這個 finding 是真問題還是誤報' },\\n    confidence: { type: 'number' },\\n    reasoning: { type: 'string' },\\n  },\\n}\\n\\n// 每個 high/medium finding 派獨立 skeptic 嘗試「反駁這是真問題」（異源驗證，打破同源天花板）\\nconst verified = (await parallel(toVerify.map((f, i) => () =>\\n  agent(\\n    `你是獨立驗證者（與發現此問題的 reviewer 不同 context）。盡力反駁以下 finding 是真問題——它可能是誤報。\\n若你能證明它不是問題（誤讀程式碼 / 已被別處處理 / 不在執行路徑），判 isReal=false。若反駁失敗，判 isReal=true。\\nFinding：${JSON.stringify(f)}\\n審查目標：${TARGET}\\n用 Read/Grep 實際查證程式碼，不要憑空判斷。`,\\n    { label: `verify:${f.lens}-${i}`, phase: 'Verify', schema: VERDICT_SCHEMA }\\n  ).then(v => ({ finding: f, verdict: v }))\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\nconst confirmed = verified.filter(v => v.verdict?.isReal)\\nconst dismissed = verified.filter(v => v.verdict && !v.verdict.isReal)\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Synthesize')\\n\\nconst report = await agent(\\n  `你是審查彙整者。產出審查報告（繁中）。\\n確認為真的 findings（已通過獨立 skeptic 驗證）：${JSON.stringify(confirmed)}\\n被駁回的誤報（記錄但不要求修）：${JSON.stringify(dismissed)}\\n低嚴重度 findings（未經對抗驗證，摘要即可）：${JSON.stringify(allFindings.filter(f => f.severity === 'low'))}\\n\\n彙整：(1) high findings 清單（R-x 編號，severity high→必修）(2) medium（建議/用戶決策）(3) low 摘要 (4) 誤報記錄 (5) 整體 verdict（pass / fix-required / needs-attention）。\\n誠實，不放大也不縮小。寫入 .claude-loop/artifacts/P3-review.md 並回報摘要。`,\\n  { label: 'review-synthesis', phase: 'Synthesize' }\\n)\\n\\nreturn { report, confirmed: confirmed.length, dismissed: dismissed.length }\\n\"}"</parameters>

  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\.claude-loop\\\\artifacts\\\\P1-design-spec.md\",\"content\":\"# P1 設計規格 v2：IsGoingToFree / IsGoingToRespinGame 結構化判斷 + Respin 雙層索引 + 狀態機 plate 內循環\\n\\n> 產出：dev-design v1（workflow 9-agent 對抗審查）→ v2 inline 修訂（proto 變更 + RoundEnd 語意 + 骨架定案，降級自審）· 2026-06-10\\n> 基底：方案三（零新抽象 · 協議純函數投影）+ 用戶定案骨架（復用主鏈 + sub-index 短路繞過 ROUND_END）\\n> v1→v2 差異見 §0；v1 對抗審查仍有效的發現（getter per-手重入、F-1 路由斷頭、死碼清單）全部保留\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 0. v1 → v2 變更（前提已變，逐項標明）\\n\\n| 項 | v1（已作廢/修訂） | v2（現行） | 依據 |\\n|----|------------------|-----------|------|\\n| 鎖定位置來源 | client 掃 Cash(14)/Mystery(20) 推導（ScanRespinLockedPositions） | **server 直接給 `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos`（增量 serverPos[]），client 跨手累加** | proto 變更：RespinLockedPos 從 RoundInfo 移到 PlateInfo（d.ts:1008/1033，🟢A 逐字驗證）；proto參數說明「Respin 時該盤面鎖住不重轉的位置」；用戶確認「增量」 |\\n| F-4 掃描 cursor off-by-one | 三案各有變體、需 m_respinLockedSet 防 | **大幅消失**：不掃盤面，只累加 server 給的位置；僅存「讀哪個 plate 的 RespinLockedPos」index 規格（§5.5） | 同上 |\\n| F-6 EffectPlate 掃描 | guard + 掃描時點問題 | **簡化**：Mystery 揭示仍改 [sub]/[sub+1]，但不涉鎖定掃描 | 同上 |\\n| ROUND_END 語意 | 隱含每手 Respin 經 ROUND_END（BLOCKER-1 根源） | **ROUND_END = 跑完一整個 RoundInfo**；plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END | 用戶確認 |\\n| 骨架 | ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN（每手碰 ROUND_END） | **ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN（繞過 ROUND_END）**；plate 用盡才 ROUND_END | 用戶拍板（AskUserQuestion：復用主鏈 + sub-index 短路） |\\n| BLOCKER-1 ReqRoundEnd | 🔴 硬阻斷（每手重複送終局訊號） | **解除**：plate 循環不碰 ROUND_END → 每 RoundInfo 送一次；剩 framework 放行條件實作前驗證 | 骨架推導 |\\n| BLOCKER-2 贏分口徑 | 🔴 硬阻斷（RoundWin 口徑未知） | **解除**：proto參數說明 RoundWin=round 總贏分 → mid-respin 用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加；數值關係待對拍 | proto參數說明 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. **消滅旗標可寫狀態**：`IsGoingToFree` / `IsGoingToRespinGame` 由「散落賦值的可寫欄位」改為「協議資料的唯讀 getter 投影」，single source of truth = server 回包，消滅「在哪設 / 在哪清」。\\n2. **索引拆雙層**：`CurPlateIndex`（局索引，索引 RoundQueue）+ 新增 `CurSubPlateIndex`（局內 plate 索引，索引 PlateQueue），推進收斂為單一受控方法。\\n3. **狀態機 plate 內循環**：含 Respin 的 RoundInfo 在內部循環播完所有 plate（繞過 ROUND_END），只在 plate 用盡時進一次 ROUND_END（= RoundInfo 級，ReqRoundEnd 一次）。\\n4. **Respin 接通新協議**：鎖定改讀 server `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos` 累加 + CheckState 優先序重排 + LeaveRespinState 補 ENTER_FREE 出口 + 刪死碼。\\n5. **支援連鎖 Respin 與「MG 局 Respin 完才進 FG」**：現有流程兩者都走錯（v1 對抗審查對碼證實）。\\n\\n### 1.1 範圍邊界（need given，不可越）\\n\\n不動 proto、不動 FeatureWheel 演出本體、不動 EnterFreeState/LeaveFreeState 演出、不順手清無關死碼。FeatureWheel→Respin 正式接線（誰消費 WheelFeatures）目前不存在（🟢A grep WheelFeatures=2 hits 無流程消費者），**不在本次範圍**——本重構讓 client 具備消化「server 多 plate 回包」的能力。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 骨架：狀態機流程（v2 核心）\\n\\n### 2.1 一手生命週期（既有，🟢A 已驗證）\\n\\n```\\nSPIN(plate) → EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → COMMON_SHOW → CHECK_STATE → {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| ID | 內容 | 證據級 |\\n|----|------|--------|\\n| P-1 | RoundQueue[0]=MainGame；`RoundQueue.length>1 ⟺ 觸發 FreeGame` | 🔴 用戶口頭，待對拍 |\\n| P-2 | `PlateQueue.length>1 ⟺ 該局觸發 Respin`（若且唯若）；[0]=正常 spin、[1..]=Respin；可連鎖 | 🔴 用戶口頭 + proto參數說明「PlateQueue=本 round 的盤面流程佇列（初始盤面、respin 後盤面等）」🟡B 佐證 |\\n| P-3 | `RespinLockedPos`（PlateInfo）= 該 plate 結束要**新增**鎖住的位置（serverPos[]，增量），只含 col 1~4 | 🔴 用戶確認 + proto參數說明「Respin 時該盤面鎖住不重轉的位置」🟡B 佐證 |\\n| P-4 | col 0/5 整輪鎖定 | 🟢A Game_Define.ts:366 `RespinLockColumns=[0,5]` |\\n| P-5 | `RoundInfo.RoundWin` = 該 round 總贏分（含所有 plate）；`PlateInfo.Win` = 該盤面贏分 | 🟡B proto參數說明明述；數值關係 `RoundWin==ΣPlate.Win` 待對拍 |\\n| P-6 | `NextFeverGameType ∈ {0,1}`（用戶）；proto參數說明措辭「進 FG/Respin」有歧義 | 🔴 用戶口頭 ⚠️**與文件字面不一致**（§3.4） |\\n\\n### 3.2 碼上事實（🟢A，v1 探索 grep 窮舉 + 本次重讀證實）\\n\\n- A-1：CheckState 派發 ENTER_RESPIN/LEAVE_RESPIN **僅** CheckState.ts 一檔（grep 窮舉）。\\n- A-2：LeaveRespinState.ts:38-45 出口只有 LEAVE_FREE/ROUND_END，**無 ENTER_FREE** → F-1 成立。\\n- A-3：EnterRespinState.ts:71-74 讀 `RoundQueue[CurPlateIndex+1]` 的 `FreePlateSymbol/MainPlateSymbol`；該二欄位 proto grep=0、IRoundInfo 無此欄 → 外來死碼，TS2339×4。\\n- A-4：proto 變更證實——`RespinLockedPos` 在 IPlateInfo（d.ts:1008-1009）/ PlateInfo（:1033-1034）；IRoundInfo 已無此欄（grep 全份僅 PlateInfo 兩處，本次逐字驗證）。\\n- A-5：兩旗標賦值點 7 處（GameView.ts:1186/1224/1228/1237、CheckState.ts:26、EnterRespinState.ts:36、FeatureShowController.ts:397）；讀取點 8 處（CheckState:24/41、EnterRespinState:32、IdleState:21、RoundEndState:26、ScatterShowState:236/448/476）。\\n- A-6：CurPlateIndex 寫 5 處（SpinState:62、RoundEndState:32、IdleState:27、UnshowPrepareState:60/66）、讀 ~20 處（局索引語意，拆雙層後不變）。\\n- A-7：SpinState.ts:62 進 SPIN 即 `CurPlateIndex+1`、:63-64 重置 PreWinHandledIndex、:68 CheckPreWinEffect → 雙層化後續轉手會重播 omen（F-2 一例）。\\n- A-8：RecoverSpinAck.ts:75 從 `cur.RespinLockedPos`（RoundInfo）搬 → proto 改後該欄位在 RoundInfo 不存在；須移到 TraversePlateInfo（:93-101）搬 PlateInfo 欄位（必改點）。\\n- A-9：EnterRespinState.ts:77 已用 `Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig(serverPos)` 解碼 serverPos→{col,row}（鎖定累加可復用）。\\n- A-10：GameView.ts:843-850 RetryRoundEnd → ReqRoundEnd(CurPlateIndex+1, isLast)，RoundEndState:69 每次 OnEnter 呼叫；ForEndToNext（:853-875）IsFreeGame→SPIN/IDLE、IsRespinGame→SPIN、否則 END。\\n- A-11：EffectPlate.ts:662 讀 PlateQueue[0]、:678-683 `!Define.IsInMG()` guard 內讀 PlateQueue[1] 且 `?? fallback` 靜默。\\n- A-12：AwardState 以 RoundQueue[i].RoundWin 對 i≤CurPlateIndex 跨局累加（:118/215/239/263）；PlateInfo 有 per-plate Win（RecoverSpinAck:98）。\\n- A-13：`npx tsc --noEmit` 現狀失效（npx→TS 6.0.3→TS5107）；TS 5.4.5 可跑但有 cc.d.ts 噪音 + 既有 TS2339×4。\\n- A-14：純邏輯測試慣例 tests/*.test.ts 零 cc 依賴 + `npx ts-node -O '{\\\"module\\\":\\\"commonjs\\\"}' --transpile-only` 自跑。\\n- A-15：FeatureShowController.PlayFreeGameEnter 呼叫者=1（測試鍵 R）；:397 賦值僅測試路徑可達。\\n\\n### 3.3 推論（🟡B，設計可用待驗證）\\n\\n- B-1：「下一 plate 同位置 = Mystery 揭示結果」僅 EffectPlate 既有寫法佐證 → EffectPlate 改點待 server 樣本對拍。\\n- B-2：Respin plate（[1..]）不出現 Scatter feature（由 P-3「僅 col1-4 轉 Cash/Mystery」推論）→ §6 scatter guard 採雙保險使推論錯也不爆。\\n- B-3：framework `roundController.CanToNextRound()` 在「plate 循環不送 ReqRoundEnd 直接 ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN」時是否放行——未讀框架碼，**實作前驗證點**（§4）。\\n- B-4：server unshow 回包指回 Respin 局時是否含完整 PlateQueue——無碼上證據，待實測（BC-8）。\\n\\n### 3.4 ⚠️ 事實不一致標註（#003/#004 紀律）\\n\\n`NextFeverGameType` 值域：用戶口頭「只 0/1」 vs proto參數說明「進 FG/Respin」（CurrFeverGameType 列 0/1/2/3）。**影響評估**：新設計 Respin 改用 `PlateQueue.length` 結構判斷，完全不讀 NextFeverGameType；舊 RespinGame/RespinInFreeGame 判斷分支正是要刪的死碼。即使 server 偶送 NextFeverGameType=2，新流程正確性不受影響，僅「刪死碼是否遺漏依賴」需 grep 確認（BC-4 涵蓋）。∴ 標註不擋進度，但**不得在規格裡把「NextFeverGameType 恆 0/1」當 🟢A 事實**。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 實作前驗證點（v1 兩個 BLOCKER 已降級）+ 前置步驟\\n\\n### 前置步驟（第一個 commit 之前）\\n\\n1. **commit 現有 working tree**：git status 8 檔 M + 2 未追蹤 png，先 commit 切分基線（用戶授權偏好：等用戶明確指示才 commit）。\\n2. **pin TypeScript 5.4.5**：記錄錯誤基線（cc.d.ts 噪音 + EnterRespinState TS2339×4）。完成閘門措辭 = 「**相對基線無新增錯誤且 TS2339×4 消失**」，非「tsc 通過」（A-13 通過不可達）。\\n\\n### 驗證點 V-1（原 BLOCKER-1，已由骨架解除）\\n\\nplate 循環繞過 ROUND_END ⇒ ReqRoundEnd 仍每 RoundInfo 一次。**剩餘待驗證**（B-3）：framework `roundController` 在「ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN 未經 ROUND_END/未送 ReqRoundEnd」時是否放行下一次 StartSpin。讀框架碼或實測確認；若卡住，fallback 為「plate 循環內補送 framework 要求的 round 推進訊號」。**非硬阻斷**（不卡其他檔案動工）。\\n\\n### 驗證點 V-2（原 BLOCKER-2，已由 proto 文件解除）\\n\\nproto參數說明 P-5：RoundWin=round 總。AwardState mid-respin 手改用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加（§5.10）。**剩餘待對拍**：`RoundWin == Σ PlateQueue[].Win` 精確相等（落實公式見 §5.10）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 5.1 【新增】assets/Script/Respin/RespinPlateLogic.ts（全案唯一新檔，零 cc 依賴純函式）\\n\\n> 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, B-4：server unshow 回包指回 Respin 局時是否含完整 PlateQueue——無碼上證據，待實測（BC-8）。\\n\\n### 3.4 ⚠️ 事實不一致標註（#003/#004 紀律）\\n\\n`NextFeverGameType` 值域：用戶口頭「只 0/1」 vs proto參數說明「進 FG/Respin」（CurrFeverGameType 列 0/1/2/3）。**影響評估**：新設計 Respin 改用 `PlateQueue.length` 結構判斷，完全不讀 NextFeverGameType；舊 RespinGame/RespinInFreeGame 判斷分支正是要刪的死碼。即使 server 偶送 NextFeverGameType=2，新流程正確性不受影響，僅「刪死碼是否遺漏依賴」需 grep 確認（BC-4 涵蓋）。∴ 標註不擋進度，但**不得在規格裡把「NextFeverGameType 恆 0/1」當 🟢A 事實**。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 實作前驗證點（v1 兩個 BLOCKER 已降級）+ 前置步驟\\n\\n### 前置步驟（第一個 commit 之前）\\n\\n1. **commit 現有 working tree**：git status 8 檔 M + 2 未追蹤 png，先 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進   <narrative>Initiated comprehensive adversarial code review workflow targeting the P1 Respin double-layer index refactoring in a Cocos game client (uk_872_eyestrike2_client). The review uses multi-agent adversarial validation to examine dual-cursor state management (m_curSubPlateIndex) and per-round data re-reading logic across multiple game state handlers. Four specific risk areas were flagged for deep analysis: potential gaps in causal chain integrity after converting to dual-layer architecture, a discovered discrepancy where real server data (RespinLockedPos) contains col0/5 contrary to spec assumptions (P-3 issue), framework-level state transition risks where ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN bypasses ROUND_END validation (V-1), and semantic correctness of feature flags (IsGoingToFree/IsGoingToRespinGame) in nested free-game respin scenarios. The review validates against real 14-round server packet data and formal design specifications, with test coverage and TypeScript compilation serving as quality gates.</narrative>

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-11T12:59:58.901Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>G:\Cocos_Project\uk_872_eyestrike2_client</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\.claude-loop\\\\artifacts\\\\P1-design-spec.md\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\Cocos_Project\\\\uk_872_eyestrike2_client\\\\.claude-loop\\\\artifacts\\\\P1-design-spec.md\",\"content\":\"# P1 設計規格 v2：IsGoingToFree / IsGoingToRespinGame 結構化判斷 + Respin 雙層索引 + 狀態機 plate 內循環\\n\\n> 產出：dev-design v1（workflow 9-agent 對抗審查）→ v2 inline 修訂（proto 變更 + RoundEnd 語意 + 骨架定案，降級自審）· 2026-06-10\\n> 基底：方案三（零新抽象 · 協議純函數投影）+ 用戶定案骨架（復用主鏈 + sub-index 短路繞過 ROUND_END）\\n> v1→v2 差異見 §0；v1 對抗審查仍有效的發現（getter per-手重入、F-1 路由斷頭、死碼清單）全部保留\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 0. v1 → v2 變更（前提已變，逐項標明）\\n\\n| 項 | v1（已作廢/修訂） | v2（現行） | 依據 |\\n|----|------------------|-----------|------|\\n| 鎖定位置來源 | client 掃 Cash(14)/Mystery(20) 推導（ScanRespinLockedPositions） | **server 直接給 `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos`（增量 serverPos[]），client 跨手累加** | proto 變更：RespinLockedPos 從 RoundInfo 移到 PlateInfo（d.ts:1008/1033，🟢A 逐字驗證）；proto參數說明「Respin 時該盤面鎖住不重轉的位置」；用戶確認「增量」 |\\n| F-4 掃描 cursor off-by-one | 三案各有變體、需 m_respinLockedSet 防 | **大幅消失**：不掃盤面，只累加 server 給的位置；僅存「讀哪個 plate 的 RespinLockedPos」index 規格（§5.5） | 同上 |\\n| F-6 EffectPlate 掃描 | guard + 掃描時點問題 | **簡化**：Mystery 揭示仍改 [sub]/[sub+1]，但不涉鎖定掃描 | 同上 |\\n| ROUND_END 語意 | 隱含每手 Respin 經 ROUND_END（BLOCKER-1 根源） | **ROUND_END = 跑完一整個 RoundInfo**；plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END | 用戶確認 |\\n| 骨架 | ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN（每手碰 ROUND_END） | **ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN（繞過 ROUND_END）**；plate 用盡才 ROUND_END | 用戶拍板（AskUserQuestion：復用主鏈 + sub-index 短路） |\\n| BLOCKER-1 ReqRoundEnd | 🔴 硬阻斷（每手重複送終局訊號） | **解除**：plate 循環不碰 ROUND_END → 每 RoundInfo 送一次；剩 framework 放行條件實作前驗證 | 骨架推導 |\\n| BLOCKER-2 贏分口徑 | 🔴 硬阻斷（RoundWin 口徑未知） | **解除**：proto參數說明 RoundWin=round 總贏分 → mid-respin 用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加；數值關係待對拍 | proto參數說明 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. **消滅旗標可寫狀態**：`IsGoingToFree` / `IsGoingToRespinGame` 由「散落賦值的可寫欄位」改為「協議資料的唯讀 getter 投影」，single source of truth = server 回包，消滅「在哪設 / 在哪清」。\\n2. **索引拆雙層**：`CurPlateIndex`（局索引，索引 RoundQueue）+ 新增 `CurSubPlateIndex`（局內 plate 索引，索引 PlateQueue），推進收斂為單一受控方法。\\n3. **狀態機 plate 內循環**：含 Respin 的 RoundInfo 在內部循環播完所有 plate（繞過 ROUND_END），只在 plate 用盡時進一次 ROUND_END（= RoundInfo 級，ReqRoundEnd 一次）。\\n4. **Respin 接通新協議**：鎖定改讀 server `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos` 累加 + CheckState 優先序重排 + LeaveRespinState 補 ENTER_FREE 出口 + 刪死碼。\\n5. **支援連鎖 Respin 與「MG 局 Respin 完才進 FG」**：現有流程兩者都走錯（v1 對抗審查對碼證實）。\\n\\n### 1.1 範圍邊界（need given，不可越）\\n\\n不動 proto、不動 FeatureWheel 演出本體、不動 EnterFreeState/LeaveFreeState 演出、不順手清無關死碼。FeatureWheel→Respin 正式接線（誰消費 WheelFeatures）目前不存在（🟢A grep WheelFeatures=2 hits 無流程消費者），**不在本次範圍**——本重構讓 client 具備消化「server 多 plate 回包」的能力。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 骨架：狀態機流程（v2 核心）\\n\\n### 2.1 一手生命週期（既有，🟢A 已驗證）\\n\\n```\\nSPIN(plate) → EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → COMMON_SHOW → CHECK_STATE → {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| ID | 內容 | 證據級 |\\n|----|------|--------|\\n| P-1 | RoundQueue[0]=MainGame；`RoundQueue.length>1 ⟺ 觸發 FreeGame` | 🔴 用戶口頭，待對拍 |\\n| P-2 | `PlateQueue.length>1 ⟺ 該局觸發 Respin`（若且唯若）；[0]=正常 spin、[1..]=Respin；可連鎖 | 🔴 用戶口頭 + proto參數說明「PlateQueue=本 round 的盤面流程佇列（初始盤面、respin 後盤面等）」🟡B 佐證 |\\n| P-3 | `RespinLockedPos`（PlateInfo）= 該 plate 結束要**新增**鎖住的位置（serverPos[]，增量），只含 col 1~4 | 🔴 用戶確認 + proto參數說明「Respin 時該盤面鎖住不重轉的位置」🟡B 佐證 |\\n| P-4 | col 0/5 整輪鎖定 | 🟢A Game_Define.ts:366 `RespinLockColumns=[0,5]` |\\n| P-5 | `RoundInfo.RoundWin` = 該 round 總贏分（含所有 plate）；`PlateInfo.Win` = 該盤面贏分 | 🟡B proto參數說明明述；數值關係 `RoundWin==ΣPlate.Win` 待對拍 |\\n| P-6 | `NextFeverGameType ∈ {0,1}`（用戶）；proto參數說明措辭「進 FG/Respin」有歧義 | 🔴 用戶口頭 ⚠️**與文件字面不一致**（§3.4） |\\n\\n### 3.2 碼上事實（🟢A，v1 探索 grep 窮舉 + 本次重讀證實）\\n\\n- A-1：CheckState 派發 ENTER_RESPIN/LEAVE_RESPIN **僅** CheckState.ts 一檔（grep 窮舉）。\\n- A-2：LeaveRespinState.ts:38-45 出口只有 LEAVE_FREE/ROUND_END，**無 ENTER_FREE** → F-1 成立。\\n- A-3：EnterRespinState.ts:71-74 讀 `RoundQueue[CurPlateIndex+1]` 的 `FreePlateSymbol/MainPlateSymbol`；該二欄位 proto grep=0、IRoundInfo 無此欄 → 外來死碼，TS2339×4。\\n- A-4：proto 變更證實——`RespinLockedPos` 在 IPlateInfo（d.ts:1008-1009）/ PlateInfo（:1033-1034）；IRoundInfo 已無此欄（grep 全份僅 PlateInfo 兩處，本次逐字驗證）。\\n- A-5：兩旗標賦值點 7 處（GameView.ts:1186/1224/1228/1237、CheckState.ts:26、EnterRespinState.ts:36、FeatureShowController.ts:397）；讀取點 8 row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 proto 變更：RespinLockedPos 從 RoundInfo 移到 PlateInfo（d.ts:1008/1033，🟢A 逐字驗證）；proto參數說明「Respin 時該盤面鎖住不重轉的位置」；用戶確認「增量」 |\\n| F-4 掃描 cursor off-by-one | 三案各有變體、需 m_respinLockedSet 防 | **大幅消失**：不掃盤面，只累加 server 給的位置；僅存「讀哪個 plate 的 RespinLockedPos」index 規格（§5.5） | 同上 |\\n| F-6 EffectPlate 掃描 | guard + 掃描時點問題 | **簡化**：Mystery 揭示仍改 [sub]/[sub+1]，但不涉鎖定掃描 | 同上 |\\n| ROUND_END 語意 | 隱含每手 Respin 經 ROUND_END（BLOCKER-1 根源） | **ROUND_END = 跑完一整個 RoundInfo**；plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END | 用戶確認 |\\n| 骨架 | ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN（每手碰 ROUND_END） | **ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN（繞過 ROUND_END）**；plate 用盡才 ROUND_END | 用戶拍板（AskUserQuestion：復用主鏈 + sub-index 短路） |\\n| BLOCKER-1 ReqRoundEnd | 🔴 硬阻斷（每手重複送終局訊號） | **解除**：plate 循環不碰 ROUND_END → 每 RoundInfo 送一次；剩 framework 放行條件實作前驗證 | 骨架推導 |\\n| BLOCKER-2 贏分口徑 | 🔴 硬阻斷（RoundWin 口徑未知） | **解除**：proto參數說明 RoundWin=round 總贏分 → mid-respin 用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加；數值關係待對拍 | proto參數說明 |\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. **消滅旗標可寫狀態**：`IsGoingToFree` / `IsGoingToRespinGame` 由「散落賦值的可寫欄位」改為「協議資料的唯讀 getter 投影」，single source of truth = server 回包，消滅「在哪設 / 在哪清」。\\n2. **索引拆雙層**：`CurPlateIndex`（局索引，索引 RoundQueue）+ 新增 `CurSubPlateIndex`（局內 plate 索引，索引 PlateQueue），推進收斂為單一受控方法。\\n3. **狀態機 plate 內循環**：含 Respin 的 RoundInfo 在內部循環播完所有 plate（繞過 ROUND_END），只在 plate 用盡時進一次 ROUND_END（= RoundInfo 級，ReqRoundEnd 一次）。\\n4. **Respin 接通新協議**：鎖定改讀 server `PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos` 累加 + CheckState 優先序重排 + LeaveRespinState 補 ENTER_FREE 出口 + 刪死碼。\\n5. **支援連鎖 Respin 與「MG 局 Respin 完才進 FG」**：現有流程兩者都走錯（v1 對抗審查對碼證實）。\\n\\n### 1.1 範圍邊界（need given，不可越）\\n\\n不動 proto、不動 FeatureWheel 演出本體、不動 EnterFreeState/LeaveFreeState 演出、不順手清無關死碼。FeatureWheel→Respin 正式接線（誰消費 WheelFeatures）目前不存在（🟢A grep WheelFeatures=2 hits 無流程消費者），**不在本次範圍**——本重構讓 client 具備消化「server 多 plate 回包」的能力。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 骨架：狀態機流程（v2 核心）\\n\\n### 2.1 一手生命週期（既有，🟢A 已驗證）\\n\\n```\\nSPIN(plate) → EFFECT_START → SCATTER_SHOW → AWARD → ROUND_SHOW_END → COMMON_SHOW → CHECK_STATE → {決策}\\nROUND_END → ForEndToNext → {IsFreeGame:SPIN/IDLE · else:END}\\n```\\n\\n### 2.2 v2 雙層循環（plate 內循環繞過 ROUND_END）\\n\\n```\\n                    ┌──────────────── plate 內循環（不碰 ROUND_END）────────────┐\\n                    ↓                                                          │\\nSPIN(plate k) → … → CHECK_STATE                                               │\\n                    ├ ① IsGoingToRespinGame（還有 plate, sub<len-1）           │\\n                    │     → ENTER_RESPIN（首手:設旗標+鎖col0/5+宣告; 累加鎖定）→ SPIN(plate k+1) ┘\\n                    ├ ② IsRespinGame（plate 用盡）→ LEAVE_RESPIN（清旗標+解鎖+清集合）\\n                    │        ├ IsGoingToFree            → ENTER_FREE\\n                    │        ├ IsFreeGame && 最後一局     → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    │        └ else                      → ROUND_END\\n                    ├ ③ IsGoingToFree                   → ENTER_FREE\\n                    ├ ④ IsFreeGame && 最後一局           → LEAVE_FREE\\n                    └ ⑤ else                            → ROUND_END（RoundInfo 級, ReqRoundEnd 一次）\\n                                                              → ForEndToNext（下一 RoundInfo / END）\\n```\\n\\n**關鍵改點**：v1 的 `ENTER_RESPIN → ROUND_END` 改為 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`（續轉下一手）。RoundInfo 間推進（FG 多局）仍走 `ROUND_END → ForEndToNext → SPIN`；plate 間推進走 `ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN`，兩條循環分離。\\n\\n### 2.3 兩條循環的索引推進\\n\\n- **plate 內**：`SPIN.OnEnter` 呼叫 `AdvancePlateCursor()`：當前 RoundInfo 還有未播 plate → 只推 `CurSubPlateIndex`、`CurPlateIndex` 不動。\\n- **RoundInfo 間**：plate 用盡 → `AdvancePlateCursor()` 推 `CurPlateIndex`、`CurSubPlateIndex` 歸 0。\\n- ∴ ENTER_RESPIN 在 sub 推進**之前**執行（CHECK_STATE 之後、下一個 SPIN 之前），掃的是「剛播完那手」`PlateQueue[CurSubPlateIndex]`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. 設計前提與證據分級\\n\\n### 3.1 協議前提\\n\\n| ID | 內容 | 證據級 |\\n|----|------|--------|\\n| P-1 | RoundQueue[0]=MainGame；`RoundQueue.length>1 ⟺ 觸發 FreeGame` | 🔴 用戶口頭，待對拍 |\\n| P-2 | `PlateQueue.length>1 ⟺ 該局觸發 Respin`（若且唯若）；[0]=正常 spin、[1..]=Respin；可連鎖 | 🔴 用戶口頭 + proto參數說明「PlateQueue=本 round 的盤面流程佇列（初始盤面、respin 後盤面等）」🟡B 佐證 |\\n| P-3 | `RespinLockedPos`（PlateInfo）= 該 plate 結束要**新增**鎖住的位置（serverPos[]，增量），只含 col 1~4 | 🔴 用戶確認 + 標註不擋進度，但**不得在規格裡把「NextFeverGameType 恆 0/1」當 🟢A 事實**。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 實作前驗證點（v1 兩個 BLOCKER 已降級）+ 前置步驟\\n\\n### 前置步驟（第一個 commit 之前）\\n\\n1. **commit 現有 working tree**：git status 8 檔 M + 2 未追蹤 png，先 commit 切分基線（用戶授權偏好：等用戶明確指示才 commit）。\\n2. **pin TypeScript 5.4.5**：記錄錯誤基線（cc.d.ts 噪音 + EnterRespinState TS2339×4）。完成閘門措辭 = 「**相對基線無新增錯誤且 TS2339×4 消失**」，非「tsc 通過」（A-13 通過不可達）。\\n\\n### 驗證點 V-1（原 BLOCKER-1，已由骨架解除）\\n\\nplate 循環繞過 ROUND_END ⇒ ReqRoundEnd 仍每 RoundInfo 一次。**剩餘待驗證**（B-3）：framework `roundController` 在「ENTER_RESPIN→SPIN 未經 ROUND_END/未送 ReqRoundEnd」時是否放行下一次 StartSpin。讀框架碼或實測確認；若卡住，fallback 為「plate 循環內補送 framework 要求的 round 推進訊號」。**非硬阻斷**（不卡其他檔案動工）。\\n\\n### 驗證點 V-2（原 BLOCKER-2，已由 proto 文件解除）\\n\\nproto參數說明 P-5：RoundWin=round 總。AwardState mid-respin 手改用 PlateInfo.Win 逐手累加（§5.10）。**剩餘待對拍**：`RoundWin == Σ PlateQueue[].Win` 精確相等（落實公式見 §5.10）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 5.1 【新增】assets/Script/Respin/RespinPlateLogic.ts（全案唯一新檔，零 cc 依賴純函式）\\n\\n> 為什麼只有這一個新抽象：觸及 stateManager/GameView 的邏輯無既有測試手段（A-14），把可測判斷收進零依賴模組是專案內唯一能放自動化測試的位置。其餘一律內聯（YAGNI）。\\n\\n```ts\\n/** 雙層游標推進：還有 plate → sub+1 round 不動；否則 round+1 sub 歸 0 */\\nexport function AdvancePlateCursorPure(round: number, sub: number, plateCount: number): { round: number, sub: number }\\n/** IsGoingToFree 投影：round===0 && queueLen>1 && !isFreeGame */\\nexport function IsGoingToFreePure(round: number, roundQueueLen: number, isFreeGame: boolean): boolean\\n/** IsGoingToRespinGame 投影：sub < plateCount-1（plateCount≤0/缺值恆 false） */\\nexport function IsGoingToRespinPure(sub: number, plateCount: number): boolean\\n/** 解碼 server 鎖定位置為顯示 entry（不掃盤面，位置由 server 給定）：\\n *  對每個 serverPos 解碼 col/row、從 plateSymbol 取 symbol/number；越界/缺值 → 跳過該筆 + 回報 */\\nexport function ResolveLockedEntries(\\n    plateSymbol: ReadonlyArray<{ Col?: ReadonlyArray<{ Symbol?: number, Number?: number }> }> | null | undefined,\\n    serverPositions: ReadonlyArray<number>,\\n    decodePos: (serverPos: number) => { col: number, row: number } | null   // 呼叫端餵 Common.DecodeServerPosByRowConfig\\n): { entries: Array<{ serverPos: number, col: number, row: number, symbol: number, number: number }>, warnings: string[] }\\n```\\n\\n- 常數/解碼器**參數注入**（decodePos），模組零依賴、呼叫端餵 Common/Game_Define 值——魔數 single source。\\n- **fail-loud 邊界**：缺欄/越界 → 收進 `warnings`（呼叫端 console.warn），跳過該筆，**不 throw 不靜默**。\\n- v1 的 `ScanRespinLockedPositions`（掃 Cash/Mystery）**移除**——位置改由 server 給定（§0）。\\n- 對應測試：`tests/RespinPlateLogic.test.ts`，遵循 A-14 ts-node 慣例。\\n\\n### 5.2 【修改】GameView.ts\\n\\n1. **旗標 getter 化**（刪 m_isGoingToFree/m_isGoingToRespinGame 欄位與 setter，:494-519）：\\n   ```ts\\n   public get IsGoingToFree(): boolean {\\n       return IsGoingToFreePure(this.CurPlateIndex, this.SpinAck?.RoundQueue?.length ?? 0, this.IsFreeGame);\\n   }\\n   public get IsGoingToRespinGame(): boolean {\\n       return IsGoingToRespinPure(this.m_curSubPlateIndex, this.RoundInfo?.PlateQueue?.length ?? 0);\\n   }\\n   ```\\n   空資料回 false 屬正常閒置語意。\\n2. **CurSubPlateIndex**：`private m_curSubPlateIndex = 0`，public **CurPlateIndex public setter 保留**：5 寫入點全改走受控方法後 setter 呼叫者歸零，但刪 setter 擴大驗證面，留後續小任務（屆時 grep=0 安全刪）。\\n2. **去向 if-else 兩份**（LeaveRespinState vs CheckState）：拒絕 DRY helper 與 CHECK_STATE 重入，4 行重複換框架零風險，兩檔交叉註解。\\n3. **續轉演出/Collect 演出時點**：給預設（不重播宣告/末手播一次）+ 接縫就位，待用戶確認，不編造演出規格。\\n4. **一個新檔**（RespinPlateLogic.ts）：違反零新模組，換唯一可自動化測試手段（BC-1/2/3/9）。\\n5. **ForEndToNext IsRespinGame 分支變不可達**：v2 骨架副產物，不順手刪（§10.5），列 /dev-review 判定。\\n\\n### 殘餘風險（按嚴重度）\\n\\n1. **🔴 協議前提碼上不可證**（P-1/P-2/P-3/P-5/P-6）：server 偏離則 getter 語意失效。緩解：LEAVE_RESPIN fail-loud 斷言（BC-6）+ 全分支 log；實作後**必須以 server 真實 Respin 回包對拍**。\\n2. **🔴 全新路徑無回歸基線**（Respin 流程目前生產不可達，舊 IsGoingToRespinGame 從未為 true）：BC-5~BC-8 無「改壞了」可比對象，只能對拍 server 樣本 + 狀態轉移 log。唯一基線=場景③。\\n3. **🟡 V-1 framework 放行**：plate 循環不送 ReqRoundEnd 直接 <observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Implemented Respin dual-layer index refactoring with state machine plate-internal loops</title>
  <subtitle>Refactored game state management to support chained respin mechanics using dual-cursor architecture and getter-based flag projections</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Respin system refactored to dual-layer cursor architecture: CurPlateIndex (round-level) + CurSubPlateIndex (plate-level within round)</fact>
    <fact>IsGoingToFree and IsGoingToRespinGame converted from mutable flags to readonly getter projections computed from server protocol data</fact>
    <fact>State machine flow redesigned with plate-internal loops bypassing ROUND_END: ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN for mid-round plates, only entering ROUND_END after all plates exhausted</fact>
    <fact>New RespinPlateLogic.ts module implements pure functions with zero Cocos dependencies: AdvancePlateCursorPure, IsGoingToFreePure, IsGoingToRespinPure, ResolveLockedEntries</fact>
    <fact>Protocol change implemented: RespinLockedPos data source moved from RoundInfo to PlateInfo with incremental serverPos arrays accumulated per plate</fact>
    <fact>CheckState priority reordering fixes critical bugs: IsGoingToRespinGame checked before IsGoingToFree prevents MG respin being discarded when transitioning to FreeGame</fact>
    <fact>LeaveRespinState routing fixed to support ENTER_FREE transition enabling "MG round Respin complete then enter FG" scenario</fact>
    <fact>Per-hand re-entry guards added across 8 state handlers to prevent duplicate animations: omen plays once per round, scatter bingo only on first plate, collect animation on last plate only</fact>
    <fact>RecoverSpinAck.ts modified to retrieve RespinLockedPos from PlateInfo.RespinLockedPos instead of defunct RoundInfo property</fact>
    <fact>Award calculation refactored to use per-plate PlateInfo.Win accumulation instead of round-level RoundWin to prevent premature score display</fact>
    <fact>Refactoring spans 34 files with 839 insertions and 366 deletions across commits bab1dbd~2 to HEAD (commit f2f739e)</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Completed major architectural refactoring of the Respin game feature in a Cocos-based slot game client (uk_872_eyestrike2_client). The refactoring introduces a dual-layer indexing system where CurPlateIndex tracks round position in RoundQueue while CurSubPlateIndex tracks plate position within each round's PlateQueue, enabling proper handling of chained respin mechanics. Critical state management flags (IsGoingToFree, IsGoingToRespinGame) were converted from scattered mutable assignments across 7 files to single-source-of-truth getter projections computed from protocol data, eliminating "where to set/clear" state synchronization bugs. The state machine flow was redesigned to support plate-internal loops: respin continuation now follows ENTER_RESPIN → SPIN directly without passing through ROUND_END, reserving ROUND_END transitions for RoundInfo-level boundaries. CheckState priority reordering fixes a critical bug where MG rounds with both respin and free game triggers would incorrectly discard respin plates by entering ENTER_FREE prematurely. LeaveRespinState routing was fixed to add the missing ENTER_FREE exit path. A new zero-dependency pure function module (RespinPlateLogic.ts) was created to enable automated testing of cursor advancement and flag projection logic outside the Cocos framework. Per-hand re-entry guards were systematically added across state handlers using a comprehensive scan matrix to prevent animation duplication (omen, scatter bingo, collect effects). Protocol integration was updated to reflect upstream changes where RespinLockedPos moved from RoundInfo to per-plate PlateInfo with incremental position arrays. The implementation includes fail-loud assertions for protocol mismatches and extensive logging for state transitions to aid validation against real server packets.</narrative>
